ddls:
CREATE TABLE "organizations" (
  "org_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organization */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the organization */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the organization is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the organization is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the organization's location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the organization's location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the organization is located */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the organization */,
  "org_type" TEXT /* Type of organization (e.g., Non-Profit, Government, Private) */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the organization was established */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  "email" TEXT /* Contact email address */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the organization */,
  "total_employees" INTEGER /* Number of employees */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* Any relevant certifications or accreditations */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the organization's logo */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the organization */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number for data tracking */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("org_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Contractor/Trade Ally, Consultant/Advisor) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "org_roles" (
  "org_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organization */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was assigned */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role assignment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("org_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "org_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organization that owns the project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., Planned, In Progress, Completed) */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the project */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Expected or actual impact of the project */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number for data tracking */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_org_id FOREIGN KEY ("org_id") REFERENCES organizations ("org_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stories" (
  "story_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each story */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project that the story belongs to */,
  "story_title" TEXT /* Title of the story */,
  "story_content" TEXT /* Content of the story */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the story */,
  "published_date" TEXT /* Date the story was published */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number for data tracking */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the story was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the story was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("story_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stories_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lessons_learned" (
  "lesson_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lesson learned */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project that the lesson learned belongs to */,
  "lesson_title" TEXT /* Title of the lesson learned */,
  "lesson_content" TEXT /* Content of the lesson learned */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the lesson learned */,
  "published_date" TEXT /* Date the lesson was published */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number for data tracking */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the lesson was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the lesson was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lesson_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lessons_learned_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_studies" (
  "case_study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case study */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project that the case study belongs to */,
  "case_study_title" TEXT /* Title of the case study */,
  "case_study_content" TEXT /* Content of the case study */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the case study */,
  "published_date" TEXT /* Date the case study was published */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number for data tracking */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the case study was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the case study was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_studies_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, project_manager, researcher) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position or job title of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "org_users" (
  "org_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organization */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was added to the organization */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user's organization association was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("org_id", "user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_users" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was added to the project */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user's project association was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id", "user_id")
)
